rationale: New URL parser fails to parse valid replicaSet URI; spec requires replicaSet param to be honored but driver throws 'no mongos proxies' error.
Resyncing SDAM test corpus with mixed-case hostname entries; test data update, not driver behavior fix.
Fixing broken unit tests and test infrastructure; no spec rule violated.
countDocuments crashes with TypeError on empty result; implementation bug, no contradicted spec rule.
Fix test helper for normalizing function strings in browser vs node; internal test utility, no spec involvement.
remove with limit=0 not supported by retryWrites per spec; user report, behavior consistent with spec.
TypeError 'nextBatch of undefined' during cursor iteration on sharded rebalancing; implementation bug, no specific spec rule.
countDocuments crashes with TypeError on empty result (docs[0] undefined); implementation bug, no spec rule contradicted.
NPM version rollback caused regression; packaging/release issue, no spec involvement.
Not master error on findOneAndUpdate; likely SDAM regression in 3.1.0, not a specific spec rule violation.
isCapped() returns undefined instead of false; API ergonomics bug, no spec area involved.
pickNearest sorts servers randomly instead of by lastIsMasterMS; server selection spec requires proximity-based ordering.
Broken GitHub edit links in documentation pages; docs issue, no spec involvement.
Adding browser test coverage for js-bson; test infrastructure improvement, not about spec conformance.
Refactor/unify duplicate bulkOp code; internal refactor with no behavior change.
Add serialize/deserialize convenience methods to mongodb-extjson; new API feature, not spec conformance.
'port must be specified' error when connecting without ports; spec says 'port has to be optional'.
Evaluating how to emit deprecation notices; internal API design, no spec rule violated.
readPreference option not honored on cursor.count(); read preference must be applied to all operations per server selection spec.
Modernize kerberos module: add badge, run clang-format, remove warnings; code cleanup, no spec behavior change.
Expose AggregationCursor class in public API; API ergonomics, no spec rule involved.
Topology not cleaned up on failed connect, causing connection leak; resource management bug, no contradicted spec rule.
Update examples to use new MongoClient() style; docs/examples update, no spec involvement.
New URI parser drops duplicate query params instead of building array; connection string spec requires repeated keys to form arrays.
New URI parser doesn't handle comma-separated values into array; connection string spec requires this parsing.
checkKeys defaulted to false in 3.x, allowing dot-in-fieldname inserts; behavior change, no specific BSON spec rule on driver defaults.
BSON serializer assumes Map keys are strings; JS-specific edge case, BSON spec doesn't define Map serialization behavior.
collection.find() called with incorrect parameters in db_ops; internal API call bug, no spec rule contradicted.
Cursor not found error after ~1000 records; cursor lifecycle/server-side expiry issue, no specific spec rule violated.
String read preference not coerced to ReadPreference object in MongoClient; internal type handling bug, no spec rule quoted.
Rename getServer to selectServer for API alignment; internal refactor, no spec behavior change.
countDocuments crashes process due to wrong handleCallback arguments; implementation bug, no spec rule contradicted.
ChangeStream stream mode bypasses resume logic on errors; change streams spec requires resumption on resumable errors.
Driver's key validator rejects $clusterTime field; sessions spec requires $clusterTime gossiping in commands.
Switch tests to use connection strings instead of topology objects; test infrastructure cleanup, no spec behavior change.
Add callback to topology destroy for test notification; internal API improvement, no spec rule involved.
Typos in GSSAPI tutorial docs; documentation fix, no spec conformance issue.
retryWrites option incorrectly applied to createIndexes; spec defines supported write ops and index creation is not among them.
Wholesale refactor of options management; internal refactor, no spec rule contradicted.
Spec section requires up-converting legacy message types to common command format; driver does not presently do this.
Implement happy eyeballs for IPv4/IPv6 fallback; network connectivity improvement, no spec rule involved.
saslprep library load-time performance discussion; dependency/performance issue, no spec rule contradicted.
Connections not destroyed when mongos restarts; connection leak/resource management bug, no spec rule quoted.
instrument() API changed shape breaking 3rd-party instrumentations; APM API ergonomics, not a spec conformance issue.
Add default/required/deprecated to options schema validator; internal validation improvement, no spec rule contradicted.
Refactor to use MongoCredentials object per auth spec 'should' wording; improvement toward alignment, not a bug fix.
Remove duplicated auth provider code into base class; internal refactor, no spec behavior change.
Deprecate eval helpers per DRIVERS-460; deprecation task, no spec nonconformance.
gssapiServiceName from URI never used; lowercasing loses the option, so service name is always 'mongodb' instead of the URI value.
Integrate single Topology type from Core into Native; major architectural refactor, no spec rule contradicted.
